title: Create: Electric Blaze
body:
# Create: Electric Blaze

A [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) addon that adds a Blaze Burner powered by Forge Energy (electricity).

To get an Electric Blaze Burner, use a Blaze Capacitor on a Blaze Burner. Use another to get a superheated blaze. Supports infinite capacitors, if you have enough energy!

Inspired by [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition)'s straw, and is balanced by default around its Alternator and Motor, but values are configurable in the Create or Forge mod config menus.
